{"config":{"cell":"final","cid":"If the prose-stratum sentinel AUC is ~0.5-0.6 for both arms, stop: thresholds cannot separate prose corrective rows, so no operating point helps and the training mix (E12) is the only lever.","decision_rule":"Propose a two-threshold (QA vs prose) candidate iff prose-stratum corrective coverage >= 2x the current fired-corrective count at <= 2x the current budget false-fire rate.","primary":"sidecar","secondary":"proxy","seed":1729},"config_hash":"fcd97bebcc29","dataset_digest":"96c5503634cf9985","experiment":"E11-threshold-geometry","metrics":{"cid_trip":0.0},"seed":1729,"verdict":"# E11 threshold-geometry verdict

## Verdict

Decision rule: two-threshold (QA vs prose) candidate iff prose corrective coverage >= 2x the
current fired count at <= 2x the current budget false-fire rate. CID: prose sentinel AUC
<= 0.60 for both arms means thresholds cannot help. Both read on the PRIMARY strata
(sidecar `source_kind == "question_answer"`); the `final_assistant` proxy is the SECONDARY,
servable view.

- Rule: FAIL on both arms. Baseline v001@0.2373: prose corrective 22/97 (cov 0.227), ff
  0.026 [0.011, 0.053]. Target: >= 44/97 (cov 0.454) at ff <= 0.052. Best feasible: v001
  23/97 (cov 0.237, 1.05x) at ff 0.034; 002 1/97 (cov 0.010) at ff 0.030. `rule_pass=0` on
  both arms, both stratifications.
- CID: no trip (`cid_trip=false`). Prose AUC 0.704 [0.647, 0.760] (v001) and 0.711
  [0.656, 0.763] (002) — CI lower bounds clear the 0.60 ceiling.
- Primary and secondary agree on both the rule (fail/fail) and the CID call (secondary
  AUCs 0.678/0.680 also sit above 0.60).

For the plan: the sentinel carries real prose signal (AUC ~0.71), enough to keep the CID
escape hatch ("training mix is the only lever, full stop") closed, and still no operating
point harvests it. Doubling prose corrective coverage costs ~7x the false-fire budget.
Fire-threshold and coverage work on prose rows therefore moves to score quality (E12
training mix), not threshold geometry, and two-threshold serving stays moot: the rule
failed and the serve-time gate is still open.

## Per-stratum reads (primary strata)

| Read | v001 (4B r1 @ 0.2373) | 002 (8b_r32 r2 @ 0.1533) |
|---|---|---|
| Prose sentinel AUC [95% CI] | 0.704 [0.647, 0.760] | 0.711 [0.656, 0.763] |
| QA fired-recall @ registered thr | 0.563 [0.502, 0.624] (151/268) | 0.787 [0.733, 0.835] (211/268) |
| Rule: max feasible prose corr cov @ <= 2x ff | 0.237 (23/97) at ff 0.034 [0.015, 0.063] | 0.010 (1/97) at ff 0.030 [0.013, 0.058] |
| Matched budget (28.08 fires/100): cov / ff | 0.392 [0.294, 0.496] / 0.183 [0.138, 0.234] | 0.392 [0.294, 0.496] / 0.209 [0.162, 0.263] |
| 2D gate frontier: best point @ <= 2x ff | 23/97 at ff 0.034 | 24/97 at ff 0.037 |

QA-stratum ROC is undefined by construction (268/268 QA rows are positives), so the QA
read is fired-recall at the registered threshold. The matched-budget row is the shape of
the failure: spending the full current budget on prose lifts coverage to 1.73x current at
7-8x the false-fire rate. The 2D (gate x sentinel) frontier says the same — 2x coverage
first appears at ff 0.175 (002, 44/97, 6.7x current) and ff 0.198 (v001, 45/97, 7.6x);
inside the <= 2x cap the frontier tops out at 23-24 fired, ~1.05-1.09x current.

## Primary vs secondary

Secondary = `final_assistant` ask-block proxy (agreement 0.9111, fp=0, fn=57); its 57 FN
land in the prose stratum (97 to 101 corrective positives, 373 to 430 rows).

| Headline | Primary | Secondary | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| Prose AUC v001 | 0.704 | 0.678 | -0.026 |
| Prose AUC 002 | 0.711 | 0.680 | -0.031 |
| QA fired-recall v001 | 0.563 | 0.716 | +0.152 |
| QA fired-recall 002 | 0.787 | 0.995 | +0.208 |
| Rule cov v001 | 0.237 (fail) | 0.228 (fail) | -0.009 |
| Rule cov 002 | 0.010 (fail) | 0.020 (fail) | +0.009 |
| Baseline prose corr cov | 0.227 (22/97) | 0.218 (22/101) | -0.009 |
| Matched-budget cov (both arms) | 0.392 | 0.396 | +0.004 |

The proxy gap is immaterial to E11's conclusion: every rule and CID call lands the same
way under both stratifications. The large QA-recall deltas are definitional — the proxy
labels QA by the exact ask block the 002 render keys on.

## Limitations

- Eval-v2 carries 117 corrective positives total, 97 in the primary prose stratum. The
  preregistered read is powered for a ~2x coverage effect only; a real 1.3x gain would not
  separate from noise here.
- The QA stratum has zero negatives under both stratifications (question_answer events are
  steer events by construction): no QA ROC, and QA-side false-fire is unmeasured.
- The serving gate is open. Th"}
